title: Server join crash guard
summary: Forces LWJGL allocator=system during Fabric preLaunch to avoid the Sodium jemalloc native crash during chunk rendering.
changes: Added a Fabric preLaunch crash guard that sets org.lwjgl.system.allocator=system.
Targets the Sodium GLDrawBatch jemalloc native crash seen immediately after joining a server.
Keeps the JourneyMap crash guard from 1.17.177.
Repaired the update manifest so automatic updates can parse valid JSON.
